title: Basic Usage

body:
A No-Code API creator
Microsoft Dynamics 365 Business Central    Watch the 30 second Overview Benefits Easy To Use Not only is configuration simple (and portable), but working with the resultant API is a breeze. Reduce Costs While we all appreciate the value of development efforts, by being able to configure your own API endpoints, you no longer have to spend time and resources on exposing data for use. Rapid No matter how good the development team is that you're working with, there is usually some waiting time, even for adding just one more field. With Data Braider, it can be as fast as check a box.
